member.name: T:e_student.GradeMonitorService
member.summary: Provides grade checking capability for the foreground service. The foreground service manages the background loop and calls CheckOnceAsync() at intervals.

member.name: M:e_student.GradeMonitorService.CheckOnceAsync
member.summary: Performs a single grade check and shows appropriate notifications.

member.name: M:e_student.GradeMonitorService.TimeUntilNextHalfHour
member.summary: Returns how long to wait until the next :00 or :30 mark.

member.name: M:e_student.GradeMonitorService.CountOtsenka(System.String)
member.summary: Counts occurrences of "оценка" in the HTML (handles both Cyrillic о and Latin o).

member.name: T:e_student.GradeMonitorViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for grade monitoring — retrieves saved credentials from app preferences. Bind IsMonitoring to a Switch and ToggleCommand to a Button.

member.name: T:e_student.NotificationHelper
member.summary: Thin cross-platform wrapper around native notification APIs. On Android it uses NotificationCompat for a persistent foreground-style notification; on iOS it schedules a local UNUserNotification.

member.name: M:e_student.NotificationHelper.ShowPersistent(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Show or update a persistent (ongoing) notification.

member.name: M:e_student.NotificationHelper.Cancel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Cancel / remove a notification by ID.

member.name: T:e_student.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
